arabic_text: وَقُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى لَمْ يَتَّخِذْ وَلَدًا وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ شَرِيكٌ فِى ٱلْمُلْكِ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ وَلِىٌّ مِّنَ ٱلذُّلِّ وَكَبِّرْهُ تَكْبِيرًا
alt_text: Arabic verse: 'And say: Praise be to Allah, who has not taken a son and has no partner in dominion and has no [need of a] protector out of weakness, and magnify Him with [great] magnification.' Sura al-Isra 17:111.
notes: Inline Quran verse image. Surah 17 (al-Isra / Bani Israil), ayat 111 (the closing verse of the surah).
